title: Lucky Leaves
description: When You Break A Lucky Leave You Randomly Get Something Good Or Bad!
body:
Welcome to the world of *Lucky & Unlucky Leaves*! Dive into a new botanical adventure where the humble leaf can bring fortune or misfortune to your Minecraft experience!

This mod introduces a variety of unique leaves, each with its own special properties. From the vibrant Lucky Leaves that shower you with bountiful rewards to the ominous Unlucky Leaves that may spawn unexpected challenges, every tree holds a secret waiting to be discovered!

🌿 **Features:**
- **Lucky Leaves:** Find these rare leaves to gain boosts like extra loot drops, temporary buffs, or even special items! Keep your adventure exciting and prosperous!

- **Unlucky Leaves:** Beware! These mysterious leaves could spawn hostile mobs, create environmental challenges, or debuff your character. Are you brave enough to risk the consequences for the chance at great rewards?

- **Crafting Recipe:** 8 Gold Ingots and 1 leaf = 10 lucky leaves OR 8 gold nuggets and 1 leaf = 1 lucky leaf

- **Exploration Incentives:** With the new leaves, exploration becomes even more rewarding. Venture into various biomes to discover different types of lucky and unlucky foliage.

Whether you’re on a quest for riches or just looking to add a little chaos to your world, *Lucky & Unlucky Leaves* will enhance your Minecraft experience like never before!

Join the adventure, test your luck, and see what fate has in store for you!
